Local • Nothing leaves this machine

Docket Finder

Drop a cause list PDF, track your firm's advocates, get a compact case report.

Tracked Advocates

Saved on this machine and reused every time you run a report.

    Upload a PDF first, then search it for the exact spelling(s) an advocate's name appears as.

    Add more cases (optional)

    Have a curated list of extra cases in a simple table — Court Hall / Item / Case No. / Parties? Upload it as a PDF or CSV and it'll be merged in, skipping anything already found in the main cause list.

      Parsing...
      ⇩ Download PDF ⇩ Download CSV

      Matching is exact-phrase (case-insensitive, ignores SHRI./SRI./ADV. prefixes) — use the search above to find the precise spelling before tracking a name.
